title: erucastrum incanum var. geniculatum
intro: Erucastrum incanum var. geniculatum, also known as a variety of the wild mustard plant, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is also used for its expectorant properties, aiding in the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Erucastrum incanum var. geniculatum can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and may also be used in salves and ointments to apply topically for skin conditions.
